title: [PATCH]: Correct language and misspelled "badge" for the contributing
author: Circuit-Overtime
pr_body_excerpt:
## Changes Made:- 

- We don't offer a badge after we are done with hacktoberfest for any means of recognition, the `CONTRIBUTING.md` was mentioning it wrong `L:57`. Shipped a fix for that

gist.headline: Hacktoberfest cleanup
gist.blurb: Tidied up our contributing guide to remove some outdated Hacktoberfest language.
gist.summary: Removed an outdated reference to Hacktoberfest badges in the CONTRIBUTING.md file.
gist.impact: Contributors will no longer be confused by mentions of legacy Hacktoberfest rewards.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing papers or erasing a chalkboard in a cozy library/study room, representing documentation cleanup.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, erasing a small chalkboard in a warm, wood-paneled library. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
